headline: Did FDA’s Stealth AXiS Expansion Just Rewire Medtronic’s (MDT) AI Surgery Investment Narrative?
summary: In late March 2026, Medtronic received FDA clearance for its Stealth AXiS surgical system to be used in cranial and ENT procedures, extending its earlier spine-focused approval and unifying AI-enabled planning, navigation, and robotics on a single platform. This expanded clearance underscores Medtronic’s push to build a connected, AI-based surgical ecosystem that can support multiple specialties and continuous software-driven innovation. We’ll now examine how this AI-enabled, multi-specialty...
